empty.title: No skills yet
empty.body: Import a skill from a file, a URL, or the community catalog.

selectPrompt.title: Select a skill
selectPrompt.body: Pick a skill on the left to preview its body.

create.title: Create skill
create.subtitle: A skill is a reusable Markdown instruction block, attached (in order) to review agents.
create.defaultBody:
# Rule
Describe the rule the reviewing agent should follow…

fields.name: Name
fields.bodyHint: Written as a directive — this is read by an LLM as instructions, not documentation.

config.title: Configuration
config.name: Name
config.descriptionHint: Shown on the skill card and in the agent Skills tab.
config.bodyHint: Written as a directive — this is read by an LLM as instructions, appended to a linked agent's prompt.

drawer.title: Add a skill
drawer.subtitle: Import from a file, a URL, or search vetted community skills
drawer.fileOnlySubtitle: Import a skill from a .md or .zip file. Read-only extraction — nothing in the file is ever executed.

file.nameHint: Optional — derived from the first heading if blank.
file.bodyHint: Pasted content is wrapped as untrusted data — never executed as instructions.
file.pickHint: SKILL.md (or the first *.md found in a .zip) is parsed for name/description/type/body. Every other file in a .zip is listed as ignored and never executed.
file.previewNotice: Preview only — nothing is saved yet. Review and edit before confirming; the skill is created disabled until you vet it.
file.ignoredHint: Read into memory to report here — never executed, written to disk, or included in the skill body.

url.label: Skill URL
url.hint: Fetched server-side, stored as untrusted, and left disabled until vetted.
url.success: Imported "{name}". Disabled until you vet + enable it.

preview.heading: Preview
preview.subheading: Rendered as the reviewing agent receives it.
preview.untrustedNotice: This skill came from an untrusted source. Its body is stored as data (delimiter-wrapped) and must be vetted before it is enabled for an agent.
preview.bodyHint: Saving a changed body creates a new immutable version.

versions.heading: Version history
versions.subtitle: Every save snapshots the body so you can diff or restore any earlier version.

stats.loadError: Could not load stats for this skill.
stats.noAgents: No agents are using this skill yet.
stats.noFindings: No findings yet from reviews using this skill.

evals.comingSoonBody: Recall/precision/citation-accuracy trace runs for this skill land in a later lesson.
